title.en: Ye Tian felt a little surprised, he didn't expe...

content.en:
"I thought that the Nine-Story Building could successfully make the Devouring Life Tree grow completely, devouring the origin of the Growing Ancient Nest, so as to suppress the Growing Ancient Nest and turn it into an ordinary large Ancient Nest, but I didn't expect that so many black-veined egg stones would appear!"

Ye Tian felt a little surprised, he didn't expect this situation at all.

And the nine-story building did not expect it, otherwise, certain measures would definitely be taken.

Subsequently, Ye Tian got the news again.

This time, not only the Nine-Story Building suffered heavy losses, but also several other top powers, losing a lot of Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, in a short period of time, the top forces can no longer suppress the expansion of the growth ancient nest.

After all, this time the Nine-Fold Building and other forces suffered heavy losses, and the other Sevenfold Ancestors didn't dare to plant the Devouring Life Tree again!

Those Dao Ancestors were also afraid of death, and if they didn't want to, it would be impossible for the Nine Pillars to force them to do it.

In fact, the Nine-Story Building was never forced, and it turned out that most of the Sevenfold Ancestors who came here took the task.

For example, protecting the Devouring Life Tree is also a task, but unfortunately this time the losses are heavy, and the other official members are afraid that they will not dare to take this task again.

Otherwise, the dense black-veined egg stones will explode by themselves, and it will really be a bit incomprehensible, no matter how powerful the Sevenfold Ancestor is, it will be difficult to bear it.

Like the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building, the Peak Dao Ancestor, all of them are gifted with demons, have high potential in the future, and are qualified to suppress and protect the Devouring Tree of Life, the Dao Ancestor is definitely a demonic genius who has condensed the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, and there is a great hope of becoming a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor in the future.

Such a genius naturally does not want to fall, so he will not take on this task easily.

Therefore, in a short period of time, no Dao Ancestor was willing to plant the Devouring Life Tree again.

Of course.

Even if no Dao Ancestor is willing to plant and protect the Devouring Life Tree, there are still many Dao Ancestors who enter the Growing Ancient Nest to hunt primordial artifacts and collect resources.

After all, although the self-explosion of the black-veined egg stone was terrifying, if it could not form a sufficient number, those top sevenfold ancestors would still not be afraid.

......

Nine-story building.

At this time, several Ninefold Origin Ancestors were discussing the matter of the Growing Ancient Nest, and several of them were specifically in charge of this matter.

Luohan Daozu spoke at this time: "Everyone, this Growing Ancient Nest incident is a bit strange, although the birth of the Growing Ancient Nest has the arms of those guys in the Primordial Ancient Sea, they are just pushing, and they will not intervene at any cost. It stands to reason that that growing ancient nest can't give birth to so many black-veined eggstones, let alone let these black-veined eggstones explode at the same time. It must have been those guys who paid the price to hook up with the growing ancient nest and forcibly sent a batch of black-veined eggstones over. There have been many growing Nest events in the past, but never before!"

Another Ninefold Ancestor also agreed: "Yes, this time is indeed a bit weird, the group of guys from the Primordial Ancient Sea would not interfere too much with the Growing Ancient Nest before, so we suppressed the Growing Ancient Nest many times, making these Growing Ancient Nests into ordinary large Ancient Nests." This time, they really want to let this Growing Ancient Nest engulf the Hanhai Boundary, and let the Growing Ancient Nest take the Hanhai Boundary and turn into a part of the Primordial Ancient Sea?"

"But they should know very well that we can't let them succeed, and the price they want to pay is not small, and if they are not careful, a war of our level will really break out!"

"It's a pity that we can't destroy this growing ancient nest, otherwise we will open a passage into the primordial ancient sea, and they will easily cross over when the time comes. "

"No matter what the purpose of those guys is, they can't make the Hanhai District boundary disappear. Otherwise, if something happens, we will lose a lot!"

"Publish the task again, let the Sevenfold Ancestor enter the Growth Ancient Nest to plant the Devouring Life Tree, as long as the remuneration is high enough, there will definitely still be a Sevenfold Ancestor entering. You can't give up planting the Devouring Tree just because the loss is great!"

"In addition, you can let some forces in other regions send a large number of Sevenfold Ancestors to enter. Our Nine-Story Building lacks ordinary Sevenfold Ancestors, and those ordinary forces are not lacking, as long as they are given benefits, they will go!"

"Yes, let's do it!"

.......

Soon, countless forces in many regions learned about the Growing Ancient Live, and then sent the Sevenfold Ancestor over one after another.

After all, the Nine-Fold Building also gave some benefits this time, plus you can get a lot of money by entering the Growing Ancient Nest, and many Sevenfold Ancestors are naturally willing to come over.

In an instant, the number of Sevenfold Ancestors inside this Growing Ancient Nest had increased by hundreds of times.

Soon, the number of primordial artifacts of the Growing Nest was reduced to dwindling.

However.

Those terrifying beings of the Primordial Ancient Sea were still putting a large number of Primordial Artifacts, many of which were powerful enough to be the top Sevenfold Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building.

As a result, the Sevenfold Ancestor among the cultivators also suffered heavy losses.

But comparatively speaking, the loss of the original antiquities was greater.

After all, how could this primordial artifact be able to rely on an ancient nest to contend with the sevenfold primordial ancestors sent by so many forces?

Even if there is a backer behind him, but the backer can't get by, it's not very useful.

At this rate, the primordial artifacts inside this growing nest will be killed, as many as they come.

In the end, this growing nest has no primordial artifacts, and it can't expand if it wants to!

In fact, all the forces think so.

However, this day changed.

Inside the Growing Ancient Live, the Endless Void was torn apart, and a large rough black hand reached over and threw a cloud of black blood at it.

In a flash.

The black blood and the growth ancient nest began to merge, and the speed of expansion of the growth ancient nest increased by tens of thousands of times at once, and it was expanding wildly in the outside world.

At the same time, this black arm also began to crack inch by inch, and soon shattered into a blood mist, which also merged into the interior of the Growing Ancient Nest, making this Growing Ancient Nest even stronger.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was dumbfounded.

What's going on?

"Retreat!"

One Dao Ancestor discovered the change, and he didn't know what the reason was, but he didn't dare to stay, and directly withdrew from this growing ancient nest.

Meanwhile.

One by one, the Ninefold Ancestor appeared inside this Growing Ancient Nest, his gaze seemed to penetrate the Growing Ancient Nest, staring at the arm that had completely turned into a blood mist.

"It's a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor level artifact that has been transformed, and it's definitely comparable to the Ninefold Ancestor Peak! At the cost of his own injury, he forcibly sent in the blood that promoted the transformation of the Growth Ancient Nest, and even sacrificed a part of himself to strengthen the Growth Ancient Nest. Now, it would be difficult for an ordinary Ninefold Ancestor to break this Growing Ancient Nest!"

Luohan Dao Ancestor didn't understand the purpose of the group of guys in the Primordial Ancient Sea, which almost seriously injured an existence at the peak of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor!

At such a price, even the destruction of a large regional boundary is not worth it!
